The '''''Assessor''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]].<ref name="OSVC5">[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 5|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 5]]</ref>

==History==
It served as a light [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] and was stationed at [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].<ref name="RD">''[[Rebel Dawn]]''</ref> The ''Assessor'' was the ship that successfully boarded the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref><ref name="OSVC5" /> after [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had been sold out by [[Moruth Doole]].<ref name="RD" />

{{Ship-stub}}
